file_insights.purpose: Session-by-session tracking of task execution, decisions, and blockers
file_insights.changes: Added Session 5 analysis of subtask-1-4 conditional execution; documents reasoning for skipping conditional retry

file_insights.purpose: Structured plan with task status, conditions, and notes
file_insights.changes: Updated subtask-1-4 status from 'pending' to 'completed' with detailed reasoning for why conditional was not met

patterns_discovered.name: Conditional Task Evaluation
patterns_discovered.description: Tasks with conditional execution paths that require analysis before proceeding
patterns_discovered.observation: Subtasks 1-4 and 1-5 both marked as 'Only execute if subtask-1-2 failed and subtask-1-3 made changes'

patterns_discovered.name: Environmental vs Test Failure Distinction
patterns_discovered.description: Separating actual test failures from environment-caused blockages
patterns_discovered.observation: Subtask-1-2 blocked by disk space + Nushell command restrictions, not by test logic failure

patterns_discovered.name: Progressive Conditional Skipping
patterns_discovered.description: When a conditional's prerequisites aren't met, skip the task and move to next non-conditional step
patterns_discovered.observation: Sessions 4-5 skip conditional retries 1-3, 1-4, 1-5 and focus on subtask-1-6 (make check)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Environmental blockers masked as test failures
gotchas_discovered.description: Disk space exhaustion and Nushell command restriction restrictions blocked subtask-1-2, but these are not test logic issues
gotchas_discovered.impact: Conditional retry (subtask-1-4) cannot be executed because the actual test failure root cause is environmental, not code-related

gotchas_discovered.description: Subtask-1-4 depends on both subtask-1-2 failing AND subtask-1-3 making changes; both conditions must be true
gotchas_discovered.impact: When any condition is false (1-3 made no changes), the entire conditional becomes inapplicable regardless of other factors

gotchas_discovered.description: Retrying a test when the blockage is environmental (disk space) doesn't solve the underlying issue
gotchas_discovered.impact: Should resolve environment first, then proceed with conditional retry logic

approach_outcome.reasoning: Evaluated conditional: subtask-1-2 blocked by environmental issues (not test failure), subtask-1-3 made no changes. Condition not met.
approach_outcome.next_step: Skip subtask-1-5 (same conditional pattern) and proceed to subtask-1-6 (make check) once disk space available

recommendations.recommendation: Address environmental blockers before attempting conditional retries
recommendations.rationale: Disk space exhaustion is preventing accurate test execution; clean/expand disk before retrying

recommendations.recommendation: Resolve Nushell command restrictions that blocked subtask-1-2
recommendations.rationale: Environmental PATH/permission issues should be fixed to enable full test suite execution

recommendations.recommendation: Document conditional task skip reasons in build-progress.txt for future auditing
recommendations.rationale: Current documentation is clear; maintain this pattern for traceability across remaining subtasks

recommendations.recommendation: After moving to subtask-1-6, consider revisiting skipped conditionals (1-3, 1-4, 1-5) if environment stabilizes
recommendations.rationale: Once environmental blockers are cleared, these conditional retries may become applicable
